header.ossHeroSubtitle: Open-source virtual office platform: spatial audio, video and a 2D world for small remote teams. Run it on your own infrastructure.

trustBar.item2Text: No US data agreement, no grey areas.

features.title: Everything your team needs. In one place.
features.subtitle: From spatial audio to custom avatars — everything in one self-hosted platform.
features.feature1Text: Hear and see only those nearby — just like in a real office. Proximity-based communication makes conversations natural and meetings unnecessary.
features.feature2Text: Build your own virtual office: meeting rooms, lounges, gardens. With the Tiled Editor, create worlds that reflect your company culture.
features.feature3Text: Share your screen right inside the virtual room — no extra tool, no meeting link. Colleagues just walk over and watch along.
features.feature4Text: Individual 2D avatars for every team member. Runs entirely in the browser; an optional desktop client is available separately.

howItWorks.title: Your virtual office in 3 steps.
howItWorks.subtitle: From signup to first coffee break — usually in under 10 minutes.
howItWorks.step1Text: Enter your email, pick a team name — you're in. No credit card needed.
howItWorks.step2Text: Pick a ready-made template or design your own office in the editor.
howItWorks.step3Text: Share an invite link or send emails. Each teammate creates their avatar and is ready to go.

secondaryFeatures.title: And so much more.
secondaryFeatures.subtitle: Enterprise features your IT team will love.
secondaryFeatures.card1Text: Owner, Admin, Member, Guest — granular access control for every team.
secondaryFeatures.card2Text: Temporary invite links for applicants, freelancers, and external partners.
secondaryFeatures.card3Text: Fully bilingual. Every team member uses their preferred language.
secondaryFeatures.card4Text: Optional billing add-on with subscription management, invoices, and self-service.
secondaryFeatures.card5Text: System health, active sessions, and user management at a glance.
secondaryFeatures.card6Text: Every team gets its own, fully isolated workspace.

faq.title: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.subtitle: The most common questions from real teams.
faq.q1Answer: On the infrastructure you operate yourself. You decide whether that is a dedicated server, a managed cloud provider or an on-premise machine — and you keep full data sovereignty.
faq.q2Answer: Create an account, pick a world, invite your team — usually under 10 minutes. Use ready-made templates or design your own office with the editor.
faq.q3Question: Which license does the software use?
faq.q3Answer: The server is licensed under AGPL-3.0, the web frontend under MIT. You are free to self-host, modify and integrate the software — as long as you respect the license terms.
faq.q4Answer: Yes. Monthly plans cancel at the end of the month, annual plans at the end of the year. No minimum term, no lock-in.
faq.q5Question: What happens to our custom maps if we cancel?
faq.q5Answer: You can export all maps as files anytime — even during the read-only period after cancellation. Your worlds belong to you.
faq.q6Question: Do we need the desktop app?
faq.q6Answer: No. The app runs fully in the browser. The desktop app is optional and adds a floating mini mode for background use.

openSource.title: Soon available as Open Source & Self-Hosted.
openSource.text: Full data sovereignty, GDPR-compliant, on your own servers. Open source: server AGPL-3.0, web MIT.

footer.tagline:
The virtual office for remote teams.
Collaborate spontaneously, from anywhere.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} {{brandName}}. Open source: server AGPL-3.0, web MIT.

download.heroSubtitle: The native app for macOS, Windows and Linux. Instant access, system integration and automatic updates.
download.comingSoonNote: We have not tested this platform thoroughly yet. It will follow once it runs reliably.
download.unavailable: The desktop app is not available for this instance.
download.footnote: Automatic updates keep the app up to date.

legal.privacySubtitle: Privacy policy in accordance with GDPR

verify.successText: Your email has been successfully confirmed. You will be redirected shortly...

auth.brandingSubline: Open source, self-hosted, AGPL-compliant. Connect your team through spatial audio, video and a 2D world — on infrastructure you control.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to enter your virtual office.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account and set up your workspace.
auth.registerTermsHint: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.inviteSubtitle: Enter your invitation code to join the team. You can find the code in the email or message you received.
auth.inviteCodeHint: The code is 12 characters long and starts with MEET-
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email address. We'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotSentBody: If an account belongs to {{email}}, the email with the link is on its way. The link is valid for {{minutes}} minutes.
auth.resetTokenHint: It's in the reset email. Your admin can also issue you a token.
auth.forgotSuccess: If an account with this email exists, we've sent you a reset link.
auth.resetSuccess: Your password has been changed successfully.
auth.setupTeamSubtitle: What's your team called and how big is it?
auth.teamSizeConcurrent: How many work at the same time?
auth.teamSizeConcurrentHint: This sets your plan. You can add as many members as you like.
auth.summarySubtitle: Review your choice and add the billing details.
auth.workspaceUrlHint: A unique identifier for your team on Meetropolis.
auth.slugExists: This handle is already taken. Please choose another one.
auth.slugInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (not at start/end)
auth.businessOnlyNotice: Offered exclusively to business customers. All prices are net, plus statutory VAT.
auth.plansLoadError: Plans could not be loaded. Please try again later.
auth.grossAssumptionNote: Gross price for Germany ({{percent}}% VAT). At checkout the actual tax is calculated from your country and VAT ID; under EU reverse charge it does not apply.
auth.perParticipantFootnote: Per-participant price at full utilisation of all participant seats. The stated package price always applies.
auth.b2bDeclaration: I confirm that I am entering into this contract as an entrepreneur within the meaning of § 14 BGB, not as a consumer.
auth.agbAccept: I accept the <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink> and the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
auth.transparencyTermValue: Monthly, renews automatically for one month at a time.
auth.transparencyTrialValue: 7 days free until {{date}}, then {{price}} per month.
auth.transparencyCancelValue: Cancel anytime to the end of the billing period.
auth.finishSubtitle: Set up your workspace now and get started right away.
auth.errAgb: Please accept the Terms of Service.
auth.errB2bRequired: A company name, legal form and the entrepreneur declaration are required for paid use.

billing.processingText: Stripe hasn't handed the booking over to us yet. This usually takes a moment — check again in a second.
billing.reconcileFailedText: We couldn't retrieve the booking status just now. Your payment is unaffected.
billing.trialStartedText: Your trial has started. Nothing has been charged yet. You will be redirected shortly.
billing.subscriptionReadyText: Your subscription is set up. You can check its current payment status in your billing settings. You will be redirected shortly.
billing.successText: Your payment has been processed. You will be redirected shortly.
billing.cancelText: The payment was cancelled. You can try again at any time.
